name: Gene Function Registry
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y vim && curl -L https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz && sudo mv yq /usr/local/bin/yq && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq && echo 'set compatible' > /home/vscode/.vimrc
